title: Fix type check for bitwise operators on unpacked arrays (#5664)
body:
## Summary
- Reject unpacked array operands in bitwise AND, OR, XOR at the type-checking stage (V3Width) with a clear error message
- Previously these reached V3DfgPeephole and caused "Mismatched LHS/RHS width" internal errors

## Test plan
- [x] Added `t_bitwise_array_bad` test covering both `arr | 1` and `arr | i + 1` cases from the issue
- [x] `t_dist_warn_coverage` PASSED (message coverage OK)
- [x] General regression tests PASSED

Closes #5664
